title: Rejection Reasons
description: Shows how rejected applicants are distributed across reasons so you can spot the biggest friction points.
noDataDesc: Once applicants are rejected with reasons, the chart will appear here automatically.
tip: 💡 Tip: Make sure to include rejection reasons when updating applicant status
rejectionCount: {count} rejection recorded under this reason ({share}% of total).
rejectionCount_plural: {count} rejections recorded under this reason ({share}% of total).
